queries.question: What are the summaries for the C19 stories?
queries.sql: SELECT Summary FROM "Books" WHERE PublicationYear BETWEEN 1800 AND 1899;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?summary WHERE {
  ?books a :Book .
  ?books p:Summary ?summary .
  ?books p:PublicationYear ?publicationyear_b .
  FILTER(?publicationyear_b >= 1800 && ?publicationyear_b <= 1899)
}

queries.question: What was Pride and Prejudice about?
queries.sql: SELECT Summary FROM "Books" WHERE Title = 'Pride and Prejudice';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?summary WHERE {
  ?books a :Book .
  ?books p:Summary ?summary .
  ?books p:Title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Pride and Prejudice")
}

What was Pride and Prejudice about?
